demographic_profile.summary: Business owners and professionals who actively manage customer relationships across multiple communication channels including phone, email, LinkedIn, and review platforms. Their purchasing decisions are driven by the need to systematically collect, manage, and respond to customer feedback to maintain business reputation and growth. They are frequently frustrated by inconsistent customer response rates and the challenge of engaging customers across disparate platforms effectively.
